items.title: Bitcoin Q-Day on the Horizon? New IBM Quantum Chip Expected to Hit Another Milestone
items.description: IBM said its new processors and software breakthroughs will speed its path toward fault-tolerant quantum computing by 2029.

items.title: Quantum Computing Stocks Are Back in the Spotlight. What Investors Should Know.
items.description: Interest in quantum computing has reached a fever pitch this week after a flood earnings reports from some of the best known pure-play quantum companies.  Benchmark analyst David Williams trimmed his price target on shares of  Rigetti Computing  to $40 from $50 and maintained a Buy rating in a note Tuesday, citing “a broader slowing of share momentum across the quantum technology landscape.”  Unlike traditional computers, quantum systems operate by the laws of quantum mechanics, which opens up a richer mathematical space for problem-solving.

items.title: After DARPA list shakes up quantum computing world, IBM has a message: We’re doing great
items.description: Not to be overshadowed by quantum competitors, IBM says it’s accelerating through its road map with two new processors.

items.title: Top Stock Movers Now: AMD, On Holding, Circle Internet Group, and More
items.description: Major U.S. equities indexes were mixed at midday Wednesday ahead of a vote on legislation to fund the federal government and end the 43-day shutdown.
